response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the minimum experience requirement (19 years vs. 15 required) and has a CS degree with strong product-building and entrepreneurial credentials. However, the role emphasizes AI strategy and expertise as a primary focus, and the resume shows minimal AI/ML specialization—only a vague mention of 'AI-agent infrastructure' at re:cinq with no demonstrated AI products or platforms. Additionally, all roles are individual contributor (Staff level), not director-level strategic leadership positions. Clarification of the depth of current AI work and evidence of strategic/advisory experience would be needed to advance candidacy.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 19 years of software engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure)
Proven product builder: founded GISCollective (open-source platform still active) and shipped products at multiple startups (WatchUp, Optilyz)
Solid cloud and infrastructure expertise: AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, and microservices architecture at scale (millions of requests/second at Sociomantic)
concerns: Minimal AI/ML specialization despite role requiring 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms'—current AI mention is vague and not product-focused
Career path shows individual contributor progression (Staff level) with no evidence of director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory, or organizational influence needed for this level
Missing preferred qualification of Master's/PhD in AI-related field; no publications, patents, or recognized thought leadership in AI domain mentioned
